rationale: Improvement adding test coverage for readPreferenceTags; 'Resyncing Spec Tests' component, depends on DRIVERS-989.
Double free in C extension buffer_grow; internal memory management bug noticed by Coverity, no spec rule violated.
Evergreen CI config update to switch OCSP mock responder dependency from bottle to flask; pure CI infrastructure.
Driver assumed operationTime always present in aggregate response; change streams spec defines response format; fix may require spec update.
OWASP buffer overflow in bson/buffer.c memcpy; security/C implementation issue, no BSON spec rule about memory safety.
Race in pool.return_socket allows stale-generation connections to re-enter pool; CMAP spec requires generation tracking to discard stale connections.
Adding CRUD spec tests for unacknowledged delete+hint; 'Resyncing Spec Tests' component, depends on DRIVERS-970.
Fix FLE integration test setup (admin DB drop fails on sharded cluster); test infrastructure fix, depends on DRIVERS-1194.
Adding __repr__ to monitoring event classes for debugging convenience; API ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
CI test failure for test_index_filter on new server version; test/server compatibility issue, no spec conformance question.
Adding commitQuorum option support for createIndexes (MongoDB 4.4 new feature); new feature addition, not a spec nonconformance.
Internal refactor removing unnecessary threading.Lock from SocketChecker; no spec behavior change.
SDAM spec updated to require topologyVersion for stale error handling; driver missing required spec behavior, depends on DRIVERS-1187.
Transaction spec test failure on 4.5 sharded cluster due to server regression (SERVER-47809); not a driver conformance issue.
Resync SDAM error handling spec tests in 'errors' directory; 'Resyncing Spec Tests' component, depends on DRIVERS-1234.
Deprecating geoHaystack and geoSearch per server deprecation; API deprecation work, no spec nonconformance.
WriteConcernError errInfo object not propagated; spec requires drivers expose this field; depends on DRIVERS-967.
Implementing speculative authentication in isMaster per spec requirement; driver lacked required auth optimization; depends on DRIVERS-918.
Compiler warning _POSIX_C_SOURCE redefined on RHEL 7.0; build/compile issue, no spec behavior.
Add missing spec tests for aggregation pipeline in bulk write updates; 'Issue split: DRIVERS-744', 'Resyncing Spec Tests' component.
Updating documentation help/issues pages with correct links; pure documentation work.
Cursor.clone() fails to copy __empty attribute; internal Python state bug, no cursor spec rule about clone behavior.
Driver ignored cursor namespace from server response, causing getMore to fail; cursor spec requires using server-returned namespace for getMore.
Documentation update noting allowDiskUse for find requires 4.4+; pure documentation improvement.
Ensuring OCSP and AWS auth tested on both server versions; CI test coverage expansion, no spec conformance issue.
Implementing OCSP test matrix for macOS and Windows per spec test requirements; test coverage work.
MONGODB-AWS auth rejects valid regional STS hosts like sts.us-west-2.amazonaws.com; spec requires handling regional STS endpoints.
Lazy start of kill cursors thread until client connects; internal optimization, no spec behavior change.
Socket left open when authentication fails; resource leak implementation bug, no specific spec rule about socket cleanup on auth failure.
Reduce default TCP keepalive time to align with Azure infrastructure defaults; network tuning, not a spec rule.
Python and Java produce different GSSAPI hostname canonicalization results for same host; explicit divergence named between drivers.
Adding diagnostic info to ServerSelectionTimeoutError; Ruby driver mentioned as inspiration, not a behavioral inconsistency requiring fix.
Transaction spec test failure on 4.5 sharded cluster; server-side data placement issue (SERVER-47809), not driver conformance.
Adding error code to OperationFailure exception message; API ergonomics improvement, no spec requirement for exception message format.
Improving PyOpenSSL handshake error messages to match stdlib ssl errors; diagnostic improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Multiple hosts with directConnection=True should raise an error per spec but does not; spec requires error on this invalid combination.
Add spec test coverage for maxStalenessSeconds with no viable servers; 'Resyncing Spec Tests' component, depends on DRIVERS-1291.
Updating text search documentation to mention $search for Atlas; pure documentation work.
Adding informative error for GridFS in transaction (unsupported combination); no spec rule mandating specific error message here.
Driver fails to cache postBatchResumeToken from empty firstBatch aggregate response; change streams spec requires caching this token.
Adding importable default APM event listener classes for debugging convenience; usability improvement, no spec conformance.
Change streams spec updated to require CursorNotFound treated as resumable error; driver lacked this behavior; depends on DRIVERS-1308.
Jython-specific SSLSocket AttributeError in poll(); platform/runtime bug in Jython, not a MongoDB spec conformance issue.
Add spec test that ElectionInProgress is not a resumable error; depends on DRIVERS-1318, test infrastructure update.
KeyError on operationTime when server omits it from aggregate response; driver incorrectly required field that spec says may be absent.
Increase replSetStepDown timeout in test setup to avoid flaky CI failures; 'Resyncing Spec Tests' component, test stability fix.
connectTimeoutMS=0 behavior with streaming protocol was undefined; depends on DRIVERS-1289 to add spec guidance.
GCC compiler warning about missing prototype in bson/buffer.c; build warning fix, no spec behavior.
_RttMonitor race keeps connection open after close(); rare internal race condition, no specific SDAM spec rule violated.
